pages.body: One Tap Away captures the bittersweet ache of modern life, where screens glow like old memories and faces from middle school populate our feeds yet remain strangers to our souls. This mid-tempo journey navigates a paradox: we are closer than ever physically, yet emotionally stranded in crowded digital spaces. The track blends organic drums with atmospheric synths to mimic the hum of late-night isolation, critiquing how likes replace love and stats measure human worth. From nostalgic realizations about fake personas to aggressive observations on performative affection, this song asks why we feel alone when surrounded by thousands of names. It is a reflective pause in an endless scroll, reminding us that true connection requires more than just being one tap away.
pages.styleSentence: A mid-tempo (96 BPM) A# minor track blending organic drums and brass with atmospheric synths to create a moody, late-night vibe that critiques modern social connectivity.

pages.text:
[singer A]
Yeah
one tap away
but somehow everybody far now
uh
check it

Back-back when the screen made the room glow
I thought the whole world would move close
old names popping up like whoa though
middle school faces in a new post

I thought we’d talk-talk, really get honest
drop the mask, no fake persona
find your tribe, find your people
make the whole cold world feel warmer

Ads in the cracks, brands in the chat
everybody got stats, everybody wants claps
everybody got reach but don’t reach back
how we got this close and lost contact?

[transition]

[singer B]
You can see me in a second
You can call me any day
You can love me in private
But scroll right past my name
Funny how we got connected
Then forgot how to stay
You're right there in my pocket
But you feel a world away

One tap away (one tap away)
From a real conversation but we don't say a thing
We're one tap away
From "I see you keep going" from "I'm proud of your dream"
Save your likes for the strangers
Save your hearts for the stars
But the ones who really know you act like loving you is hard
One tap away
So why do I feel alone in a room full of names?

Tap, tap, but you don't reach back
Heart, heart, but it don't feel like that
Close, close, close, but we don't connect
One tap away and we still forget

Click, click, click, everybody got a new rule
Don't hype friends that ain't cool, cool
Save that love for the big names
Blue checks, big chains, big views
Then if a stranger blow up overnight
Everybody swear they saw the light
Same ones quiet when you need a fire
Now they in the comments like "that's my guy"

[transition]

[singer A]
We one tap away
one tap away
from a real conversation
but we don’t say a thing

Save your likes for the strangers
save your hearts for the stars
but the ones who really know you
act like loving you is hard

Maybe I was young
thinking wires could heal us
thinking all this light
would finally reveal us

I’m not hard to find
I’m not far away
I’m still right here
one tap away

We one tap away
one tap away
so why do I feel alone
in a room full of names?

one tap away
and still so far
everybody online
nobody where you are

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Sings with raw honesty about the cost of scrolling past real feelings.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Layers harmonies that weave through the silence between online messages.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps the floor shaking without ever missing a downbeat in this melancholic

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Adds subtle taps that sound like fingers hovering over glass screens.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Rumbles deep beneath the surface of our hyper-connected, yet lonely existence.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Paints atmospheric textures that mimic the glow and hum of late-night isolation.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Scatters digital dust to fill the empty spaces between us all.

members.name: KEYS
members.bio: Plays melancholic melodies that sound like memories fading into static noise.

members.name: BRASS
members.bio: Blows warm, organic notes that cut through the cold air of social media.

levels.name: CROWDED EXISTENTIAL
levels.emotion: Existential dread in a crowded space
